zh.lifeSummary: 當Anne Verney於1514年出生在英國賀特福爾朋德利 曼諾時，她的父親Sir Ralph Verney32歲，母親Margaret Emme Iwardby37歲。她於1533年與Thomas Grey在英國斯塔福爾恩維爾結婚。他們至少是5個兒子和6個女兒的父母。她去世於1578年在英國斯塔福爾恩維爾享年64歲，埋葬在英國諾廷加姆爾沃拉阿頓。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Anne Verney于1514年出生在英国賀特福爾朋德利 曼諾时，她的父亲Sir Ralph Verney32岁，母亲Margaret Emme Iwardby37岁。她于1533年与Thomas Grey在英国斯塔福爾恩維爾结婚。他们至少是5个儿子和6个女儿的父母。她去世于1578年在英国斯塔福爾恩維爾享年64岁，埋葬在英国諾廷加姆爾沃拉阿頓。

nameMeanings.name: Verney
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.

variants.name: Varney
meanings: English: of Norman origin, a habitational name from a French place called Vernay, probably chiefly Saint-Paul-de-Vernay (Calvados). The placename comes from a derivative of Gaulish verno- ‘alder’ + the locative suffix -acum.

nameMeanings.name: Anne
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Pet form of   Ann   or   Anne .

variants.name: Anni
meanings: Pet form of   Ann   or   Anne .

historicEvents.title: Book of Common Prayer
historicEvents.description: Book of Common Prayer, a product of the English Reformation, was published in 1549 for assistance in the administration of the sacraments and other rites and ceremonies of the church according to the use of the Church of England. The book outlined morning, evening, and communion prayers and orders for baptism and marriage, thus making England a truly Protestant state.

historicEvents.title: Act of Uniformity
historicEvents.description: The Act of Uniformity was passed by the Parliament of England and required all people to go to church once a week. The consequence of not attending church was a fine of 12 pence, which was a considerable amount for a poor person.

historicEvents.title: State Lottery
historicEvents.description: A State Lottery was recorded in 1569. The tickets were sold at St. Paul's Cathedral in London.

historicEvents.title: The Royal Exchange is Organized
historicEvents.description: The Royal Exchange was organized in January 1571 by Sir Thomas Gresham. Gresham is known as the father of English banking.

en.lifeSummary: When Anne Verney was born in 1514, in Pendley Manor, Hertfordshire, England, her father, Sir Ralph Verney, was 32 and her mother, Margaret Emme Iwardby, was 37. She married Thomas Grey in 1533, in Enville, Staffordshire, England. They were the parents of at least 5 sons and 6 daughters. She died in 1578, in Enville, Staffordshire, England, at the age of 64, and was buried in Wollaton, Nottinghamshire, England.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Anne Verney est née en 1514, à Pendley Manor, Hertfordshire, Angleterre, son père, Sir Ralph Verney, avait 32 ans et sa mère, Margaret Emme Iwardby, avait 37 ans. Elle a épousé Thomas Grey en 1533, à Enville, Staffordshire, Angleterre. Ils ont eu au moins 5 fils et 6 filles. Elle est décédée en 1578, à Enville, Staffordshire, Angleterre, à l’âge de 64 ans, et a été enterrée à Wollaton, Nottinghamshire, Angleterre.

de.lifeSummary: Als Anne Verney 1514 in Pendley Manor, Hertfordshire, England geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Sir Ralph Verney 32 und ihre Mutter Margaret Emme Iwardby 37. Sie hat 1533 in Enville, Staffordshire, England Thomas Grey geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 5 Söhne und 6 Töchter. Sie starb 1578 im Alter von 64 Jahren in Enville, Staffordshire, England und wurde in Wollaton, Nottinghamshire, England begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Anne Verney è nata il nel 1514 nel Pendley Manor, Hertfordshire, England, sua padre, Sir Ralph Verney, aveva 32 anni e sua madre, Margaret Emme Iwardby, aveva 37 anni. Lei sposato Thomas Grey nel 1533, nel Enville, Staffordshire, England. Erano genitori di almeno 5 figli e 6 figlie. Morì nel 1578, nel Enville, Staffordshire, England, all'età di 64 anni, e fu sepolta a Wollaton, Nottinghamshire, England.

ja.lifeSummary: Anne Verneyが1514年にイギリスハートフォードシュアイアペンドリー マノーで生まれた時，父Sir Ralph Verneyは32歳，母Margaret Emme Iwardbyは37歳であった。1533年にイギリススタフォードシュアイアエンヴィルでThomas Greyと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも5人の息子と6人の娘の親であった。彼女は1578年にイギリススタフォードシュアイアエンヴィルで64歳で死去し，イギリスノッティンガムシュアイアウオラトンにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Anne Verney(이)가 1514년 영국 허트퍼드실르 펜들리 먼어에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Sir Ralph Verney(은)는 32세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Margaret Emme Iwardby(은)는 37세였다. 그녀는 1533년 영국 스태퍼드실르 빌에서 Thomas Grey(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 다섯 명의 아들과 여섯 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1578년 영국 스태퍼드실르 빌에서 64세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 노틴그함실르 울라턴에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Anne Verney nasceu em 1514, em Pendley Manor, Hertfordshire, Inglaterra, seu pai, Sir Ralph Verney, tinha 32 anos e sua mãe, Margaret Emme Iwardby, tinha 37 anos. Ela casou-se com Thomas Grey em 1533, em Enville, Staffordshire, Inglaterra. Eles tiveram pelo menos 5 filhos e 6 filhas. Ela faleceu em 1578, em Enville, Staffordshire, Inglaterra, com 64 anos, e foi sepultada em Wollaton, Nottinghamshire, Inglaterra.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Anne Verney родилась в 1514 г. в местности пендли манор, хиртфордшир, Англия, её отцу по имени Sir Ralph Verney было 32 года, а матери, которую звали Margaret Emme Iwardby, 37. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Thomas Grey в 1533 г. в местности энвилл, стаффордшир, Англия. У них было по крайней мере 5 сыновей и 6 дочерей. Она умерла в 1578 г. в местности энвилл, стаффордшир, Англия в возрасте 64 лет и была похоронена в местности воллатон, ноттингхамшир, Англия.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Anne Verney nació en 1514, en Pendley Manor, Hertfordshire, Inglaterra, su papá, Sir Ralph Verney, tenía 32 años y su mamá, Margaret Emme Iwardby, tenía 37 años. Se casó con Thomas Grey en 1533, en Enville, Staffordshire, Inglaterra. Fueron padres de por lo menos 5 hijos y 6 hijas. Murió en 1578, en Enville, Staffordshire, Inglaterra, a la edad de 64 años, y fue sepultada en Wollaton, Nottinghamshire, Inglaterra.
